mapper.insert: INSERT INTO agent_ui.conversation (id, title, created_at, updated_at, user_id) VALUES (#{id}, #{title}, #{createdAt}, #{updatedAt}, #{userId})
INSERT INTO agent_ui.conversation (id, title, created_at, updated_at, user_id) VALUES (#{id}, #{title}, #{createdAt}, #{updatedAt}, #{userId}) ON CONFLICT (id) DO NOTHING
mapper.select: SELECT COUNT(*)::int FROM agent_ui.conversation WHERE id = #{id} AND archived_at IS NULL
SELECT id, title, created_at::text AS created_at, updated_at::text AS updated_at FROM agent_ui.conversation WHERE archived_at IS NULL ORDER BY updated_at DESC LIMIT 200
SELECT id, title, created_at::text AS created_at, updated_at::text AS updated_at FROM agent_ui.conversation WHERE archived_at IS NULL AND user_id = #{userId} ORDER BY updated_at DESC LIMIT 200
SELECT title FROM agent_ui.conversation WHERE id = #{id} AND archived_at IS NULL
